q: From where does the name “Canada” come?
q_fr: D’où vient le nom « Canada » ?
q_fa: نام "کانادا" از کجا آمده است؟
options_en: From the Inuit word meaning country
From the French word meaning joining
From the Métis word meaning rivers
From “Kanata”, the Huron-Iroquois word for village
options_fr: From the Inuit word meaning country
From the French word meaning joining
From the Métis word meaning rivers
From “Kanata”, the Huron-Iroquois word for village
options_fa: From the Inuit word meaning country
From the French word meaning joining
From the Métis word meaning rivers
From “Kanata”, the Huron-Iroquois word for village

q: Who was the first leader of a responsible government of Canada in 1849?
q_fr: Qui fut le premier chef d'un gouvernement responsable au Canada en 1849?
q_fa: اولین رهبر یک دولت مسئول کانادا در سال 1849 چه کسی بود؟

q: Who were the United Empire Loyalists?
q_fr: Qui étaient les Loyalistes?
q_fa: لویالیست‌ها چه کسانی بودند؟
options_en: Settlers who came to Canada from the United States during and after the American Revolution
options_fr: Settlers who came to Canada from the United States during and after the American Revolution
options_fa: Settlers who came to Canada from the United States during and after the American Revolution

q_fr: Quand la colonisation anglaise a-t-elle commencé au Canada?
q_fa: اسکان انگلیسی‌ها در کانادا از چه زمانی آغاز شد؟

q: When did the name of “Canada” begin appearing on maps?
q_fr: Quand le nom « Canada » a-t-il commencé à apparaître sur les cartes ?
q_fa: از چه زمانی نام "کانادا" روی نقشه ها ظاهر شد؟

q: What did Great Britain rename the French colony of the 1700s?
q_fr: Comment la Grande-Bretagne a-t-elle renommé la colonie française au 18e siècle?
q_fa: بریتانیا مستعمرهٔ فرانسوی را در قرن ۱۸ چه نامید؟

q: Which current provinces came out from the Constitutional Act?
q_fr: Quelles provinces actuelles sont sorties de la Loi constitutionnelle ?
q_fa: کدام استان های فعلی از قانون اساسی خارج شده اند؟

q: When did the name “Canada” become official?

q_fa: از چه زمانی نام "کانادا" رسمی شد؟

q: Who dominated the fur trade in the North West during the French and British regimes?
q_fr: Qui a dominé la traite des fourrures dans le Nord-Ouest sous les régimes français et britannique?

options_fr: La Compagnie de la Baie d'Hudson

q: Which countries fought in the War of 1812?
q_fr: Quels pays ont combattu dans la guerre de 1812?
q_fa: در جنگ ۱۸۱۲ کدام کشورها جنگیدند؟
options_en: United Kingdom and United States of America
United States of America, France and United Kingdom
options_fa: United Kingdom and United States of America
United States of America, France and United Kingdom

q: In which year did the American attempt to conquer Canada fail?
q_fr: En quelle année la tentative américaine de conquérir le Canada a-t-elle échoué?
q_fa: در کدام سال تلاش آمریکا برای فتح کانادا شکست خورد؟

q: What is a “responsible government”?
q_fr: Qu'est-ce qu'un « gouvernement responsable »?
q_fa: «حکومت مسئول» چیست؟
options_en: The government is responsible for everything in the country
The government is responsible for making laws
The Crown must have the support of all of the elected representatives in order to govern
The government must resign if it loses a confidence vote in the assembly
options_fr: Le gouvernement est responsable de tout dans le pays
Le gouvernement est responsable de faire les lois
La Couronne doit avoir le soutien de tous les élus pour gouverner
Le gouvernement doit démissionner s'il perd un vote de confiance à l'assemblée
options_fa: The government is responsible for everything in the country
The government is responsible for making laws
The Crown must have the support of all of the elected representatives in order to govern
The government must resign if it loses a confidence vote in the assembly

q: What does Confederation mean?
q_fr: Que signifie Confédération ?
q_fa: کنفدراسیون یعنی چه؟
options_en: The United States Confederate soldiers came to Canada
Joining of communities to become a province
Joining of suburbs to form a large city
Joining of provinces to make a new country
options_fr: Les soldats confédérés américains sont venus au Canada
Réunion de communautés pour former une province
Réunion de banlieues pour former une grande ville
Réunion des provinces pour former un nouveau pays
options_fa: The United States Confederate soldiers came to Canada
Joining of communities to become a province
Joining of suburbs to form a large city
Joining of provinces to make a new country

q: What is the meaning of the Remembrance Day poppy?
q_fr: Que signifie le coquelicot du jour du Souvenir?
q_fa: شقایق روز یادبود چه معنایی دارد؟
options_en: To remember our Sovereign, Queen Elizabeth II
To honour Prime Ministers who have died
To remember the sacrifices of Canadians who have served or died in wars up to the present day

Pour honorer les premiers ministres décédés
Pour se souvenir du sacrifice des Canadiens qui ont servi ou sont morts dans les guerres
options_fa: To remember our Sovereign, Queen Elizabeth II
To honour Prime Ministers who have died
To remember the sacrifices of Canadians who have served or died in wars up to the present day

q: Why is the Constitution Act of 1982 important in Canadian history?
q_fr: Pourquoi la Loi constitutionnelle de 1982 est-elle importante dans l'histoire du Canada ?
q_fa: چرا قانون اساسی 1982 در تاریخ کانادا مهم است؟
options_en: It allows Canada to change the Constitution without asking approval of the British Government
The Queen became more involved in Canadian Government
options_fr: Il permet au Canada de modifier la Constitution sans demander l'approbation du gouvernement britannique.
Cela donne plus de libertés aux Canadiens
Cela a changé les lois sur l'immigration
La Reine s'implique davantage dans le gouvernement canadien
options_fa: It allows Canada to change the Constitution without asking approval of the British Government
The Queen became more involved in Canadian Government

The effort by women to participate in military service
An unsuccessful movement to get husbands to do housework
The effort by women to be in Parliament

Un effort des femmes pour combattre pendant la guerre
Un effort des femmes pour travailler
Un effort des femmes pour être au Parlement

An unsuccessful movement to get husbands to do housework
The effort by women to be in Parliament
